title: IDF draws up Lebanon plans amid concern Iran deal could curb fighting with Hezbollah
snippet: The IDF is drawing up plans for a 7-8km buffer zone in Lebanon, with Zamir approving the plans amid concern that a U.S.-Iran deal could constrain Israel's ability to continue fighting Hezbollah.
tag_reason: 신규 — IDF가 미-이란 합의로 헤즈볼라 전투가 제한될 수 있다는 우려 속에 레바논 7-8km 완충지대 계획을 수립한 보도
